sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n89217" key="prosepimeri/zw" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">προσεπι-μερίζω</orth>, <sense id="n89217.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">allot, assign in addition, add</tr_>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg1383.tlg001:18:15" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Gem.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">18.15</biblScope></bibl>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg1764.tlg001:155:35" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Vett.Val.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">155.35</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
